{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032122373957DA2367F365081424D3"}"},"total":38},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7472660830301602585","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"节奏不错。缺点是一些人物性格的把握和角色塑造有缺陷，当然这和篇幅小也有关系，剧情发展显得比较仓促。优点是故事发展还是流畅的，角色和故事也没什么恶心的点，开头的伏笔有点牵强但还算可以接受。
严格来说满分10分打8分吧，但是这里是番茄所以加两分上限，情绪价值给够了值得5星"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1739869445,"group_id":"7455713972596001817","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2D5sFZ9rCzz5NWb2megYym10Kvr/7fXcJmLLubVXPwW","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/e582b86e44b547a589e36f3a8148e68a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776617373&x-signature=bCfUpSD5yT61OOY5YiU%2FENm3hUU%3D","user_id":"1341881237636655","user_name":"胡说八道的阿茄"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1341881237636655","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7455713972596001817","book_info":{"abstract":"【赛博朋克2077游戏世界背景】【V+帕南双女主】
莫名其妙穿越到赛博朋克2077的世界，但是出生在赛博空间怎么办？自己手搓个系统就完事了！
手搓的系统出了问题怎么办？好在成了真正的系统，更好用了！
但是发现来的有点晚了，好兄弟杰克已经挂了怎么办？那就想办法再救回来就好了！
且看齐落如何拯救V、杰克、索尔、蝎子、艾芙琳乃至整个阿德卡多家族...一步步踏上赛博世界的巅峰！
